diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,154 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration (SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter).
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Default router is a SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono application class with routing functionality, middleware handling, and request dispatching.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, Hono, Context, Router, compose, Context, FetchEventLike, Handlers, Env, Schema, MiddlewareHandler, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler.
+- Simple note: Base implementation with HTTP methods, middleware, and path-based routing.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router using pre-compiled regular expressions for path matching.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams, add, match.
+- Simple note: Builds regex patterns from routes; throws UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear array-based router that checks routes sequentially for matches.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, hasStar, hasLabel, params.
+- Simple note: Fast matching but less memory efficient; processes routes in registration order.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Exports both runtime and preparation utilities for regex-based routing.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Core RegExpRouter class using trie-based path pre-processing and compiled regex patterns for matching.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, buildWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Two-phase routing: routes are precompiled during add phase, matching uses compiled regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and provides match function for RegExpRouter to resolve handlers.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, HandlerData, StaticMap, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match.
+- Simple note: Checks static paths first, then uses compiled regex for dynamic matches.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation for building regex patterns from path tokens.
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, compareKey.
+- Simple note: Tree structure with children; ensures valid regex by tracking pattern types (literal, label, wildcard).
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that builds compiled regex and index mappings from path tokens.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, Node, PATH_ERROR, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp.
+- Simple note: Processes path tokens and generates regex with handler and param index mappings.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter class for static initialization of RegExpRouter matchers.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, Matcher, StaticMap, HandlerData, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
+- Simple note: Prepares matchers and relocateMap for serialized initialization of RegExpRouter.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Hybrid router that delegates to other routers, auto-selecting the most capable one.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, add, match, activeRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests routers sequentially; uses first successful match; caches active router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router for path matching using tree traversal algorithm.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, add, match.
+- Simple note: Builds and traverses a prefix tree; fast lookup for static routes.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node class with search capabilities for path matching.
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, emptyParams.
+- Simple note: Each node manages child routes and parameters; search walks the tree.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite for common routing behavior across all router implementations.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, Router, Params, ParamIndexMap, describe, it, expect, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: Defines standard test cases used by all router test files.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter implementation.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect.
+- Simple note: Skips complex pattern tests; tests regex pattern conversion and simple matching.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter implementation.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: Skips multi-match param tests; validates linear route processing and simple matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter implementation.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, ParamStash, describe, it, expect, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: Tests regex compilation; allows some patterns unsupported by static matching.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter wrapper combining other routers.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: Wraps composite router using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter implementation.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach.
+- Simple note: Full test coverage; all trie-based tests pass.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class.
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect, insert, search, Params.
+- Simple note: Extensive node-level tests covering all search scenarios.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- **pattern-router**: Lightweight regex-based matching; skip ambiguous patterns; used when precise pattern control needed.
+  - src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- **linear-router**: Array-based sequential matching; fastest for flat route sets; skip complex params; limited multi-match support.
+  - src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- **reg-exp-router**: Trie-to-regex compilation; two-phase routing; throws on ambiguity; supports serialization via PreparedRegExpRouter.
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- **smart-router**: Hybrid composite router; auto-selects active router; delegates to inner routers; used by Hono by default.
+  - src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- **trie-router**: Tree-based path matching; no compilation step; fast for static routes; supports complex param matching.
+  - src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

To complete this task, I'll start by creating the bench-artifacts directory if needed, then systematically read all the specified files to extract their content, and finally write the routing-read-write-ledger.md document with the required format.

Let me start by creating the bench-artifacts directory.
